evals.description: Triggers on community strategy design request
evals.prompt: I want to build a community for our developer tool. Where do I start?
How do I moderate our Discourse forum and handle toxic users?
What KPIs should I track to know if my community is healthy?
Design a champions program for our 5,000-member developer community.

evals.description: Produces a moderation policy template with enforcement ladder
evals.prompt: Write community guidelines for our new Slack workspace.

evals.description: Designs a feedback loop from community to product team
evals.prompt: How do I systematically route community feedback to our product team?
Our community is active for a week after launches then goes quiet. How do we sustain engagement?

evals.description: Applies the 1-9-90 rule when advising on lurker engagement
evals.prompt: Most of our community members never post. Should I be worried?
We hit 10,000 members! How do we report this success to leadership?

evals.description: Warns against extracting before giving value
evals.prompt: We just launched our community 2 weeks ago with 50 members. Can we ask them to fill out a product survey?

evals.description: Does not trigger for paid social media advertising
evals.prompt: What Facebook ad targeting should I use to grow our brand awareness?

evals.description: References moderation-playbook.md for escalation procedure depth
evals.prompt: I need detailed response templates for warning, suspending, and banning members.
